trigger.description: Workspace hygiene capped its content inspection of .beads/issues.jsonl at BEADS_JSONL_MAX_INSPECT_BYTES (8 MiB) because the file exceeded the bound. Classification of the inspected prefix is unaffected, but conflict markers and parse errors past the cap will not be detected.
setup_commands: # In a temporary workspace, write a .beads/issues.jsonl payload larger than BEADS_JSONL_MAX_INSPECT_BYTES (8 MiB) so the inspector hits the truncation cap

repair_strings: Archive closed beads or split the tracker so the JSONL stays under the inspection bound.
Re-run hygiene after pruning so conflict markers past the cap are seen.
